Literal.Value:
'library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Colors
color_current <- "#5B8DBE"
color_py <- "#D4A574"

# Month order
month_order <- c("Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec")

# Prepare data
dataset$month_factor <- factor(dataset[,3], levels=month_order)
dataset <- dataset[order(dataset$month_factor),]
dataset$month_index <- as.numeric(dataset$month_factor)

# Reshape to long format for ggplot
data_long <- data.frame(
  month_index = rep(dataset$month_index, 2),
  month = rep(dataset[,3], 2),
  value = c(dataset[,1], dataset[,2]),
  series = rep(c("Order Lines YTD", "Order Lines (PY) YTD"), each=nrow(dataset))
)

# Last index
last_idx <- nrow(dataset)

# Last points only
data_last <- data_long %>%
  filter(month_index == max(month_index))

# Format function
format_thousands <- function(val) {
  paste0(round(val/1000), "K")
}

# Max value for y-axis limit
max_val <- max(data_long$value, na.rm=TRUE)

# Create plot
p <- ggplot(data_long, aes(x=month_index, y=value, color=series, linetype=series)) +
  geom_line(size=1.8) +
  geom_point(
    data=data_last,
    aes(x=month_index, y=value, color=series),
    size=5,
    shape=21,
    fill="white",
    stroke=2.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data=data_last,
    aes(x=month_index + 0.4, y=value, label=format_thousands(value), color=series),
    hjust=0,
    size=6,
    fontface="bold",
    show.legend=FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values=c("Order Lines YTD"=color_current, "Order Lines (PY) YTD"=color_py),
    name=""
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values=c("Order Lines YTD"="solid", "Order Lines (PY) YTD"="dashed"),
    name=""
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks=1:12,
    labels=month_order,
    limits=c(0.5, 15),
    expand=c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels=function(x) paste0(round(x/1000),"K"),
    limits=c(0, max_val * 1.15),
    expand=c(0, 0)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=16) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y=element_line(color="#ADB5BD", size=0.5),
    panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
    axis.title.y=element_text(color="#495057", size=14),
    axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1, color="#6C757D", size=13),
    axis.text.y=element_text(color="#6C757D", size=13),
    legend.position="top",
    legend.text=element_text(size=13),
    plot.margin=margin(10, 40, 10, 10, "pt")
  ) +
  labs(y="Order Lines YTD")

print(p)'
